name: Orange Cookies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice and grate the rind of the orange; remove seeds from the juice.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar replacement.
3. Add egg, orange juice, and grated orange rind to the mixture, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a sifter, then add alternately with buttermilk to the creamed mixture. Stir until blended.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, 2 to 3 inches (5 to 7 cm) apart.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 to 12 minutes.
Note: Each cookie contains a combination of 1/3 fruit and 1/3 fat calories. Using sugar replacement results in 27 total calories, while using fructose results in 30 total calories.
